headline_line1.description: First line of the two-line headline.

headline_line2_accent.description:
Second line, rendered with the gradient arc treatment. The
between lines is provided by the template — do not include it here.

friction_text.description: Small muted friction-busting line below the CTA (e.g. '2-minute setup · works with your existing forms · remove anytime').

usage_notes: Dark full-bleed final CTA with gradient arc atmosphere and a two-line headline (second line gradient). Use once per page, at the bottom before the footer.
